generated_oml:
instance BimDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Data transmitted from enriched BIM files"
]

instance BimData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Enriched Building Information Modeling files containing sensor, actuator, and controller specifications"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BimDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MdeTransformationEnabler
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model based on BIM for building structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MdeTransformationEnabler
]

instance SemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic model providing unified foundation for Building Control Systems components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MdeTransformationEnabler
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model representing control logic for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MdeTransformationEnabler
]

instance MdeTransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering transformation for generating deployable DT artifacts from enriched BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OperationalEfficiencyOptimizationService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for maintenance and performance forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenancePredictionInsight, PerformanceForecastingInsight
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalEfficiencyOptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision-making support service for stakeholders across building lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems for operational status"
]

instance MaintenancePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for maintenance needs based on system data"
]

instance PerformanceForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasting of building performance metrics for future conditions"
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for optimizing operational efficiency of building systems"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Decision-making support for stakeholders across design, construction, and operations phases"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building asset across lifecycle stages from design to operations and maintenance"
    base:contains GeometricModel, SemanticModel, BehavioralModel
]

instance BuildingSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "A building or infrastructure asset within the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain, characterized by its lifecycle stages from initial design through construction to operations and maintenance, requiring integration of static models with runtime data for simulation, analysis, and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingEnvironment
]
